[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111100000 4
1 010111001 5
2 101110100 5
3 001100110 4
4 010101010 4
5 111100000 4
6 010111111 7
7 000101000 2
